race.comment: TWO TIME CHARLIE (3) stormed home to win fresh last campaign before jumping favourite ahead of Oaks winner Wonderfully Made before the break. No trial since, but he draws well here and has shown versatility in his efforts. Looks well placed on his form last campaign and he can resume a winner. HERAULT (2) is another on resumption, but he'll be fitter for a recent trial. The booking of Pike is a big push for his chances and this looks a very suitable race for him on his return. Can land the knockout blow fresh. BELAURA STAR (1) finished off strongly last time out and has returned in good order. Now out to 1300m which looks ideal and he can be coming home with a wet sail once again. KIMBERLEY CURRENCY (9) can improve on the fresh effort. OCTOBER ROX (6) is better than he showed last time out and can bounce  back to his best.
